message:
refactor: extend BTreeMap migration to epoll reactor and runtime state snapshot

Continue the HashMap → BTreeMap deterministic iteration migration into two
previously-untouched files:

- runtime/reactor/epoll.rs: Switch ReactorState.tokens and .fds maps from
  HashMap to BTreeMap, update the ASCII architecture diagram to reflect
  BTreeMap<Token, info>
- runtime/state.rs: Switch snapshot obligations_by_task from HashMap to BTreeMap
  for deterministic serialization of runtime snapshots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
